title: Small Held Items
description: A resourcepack that makes all item models when you hold them smaller. This includes all blocks and items.
body:
# Features
This resourcepack reduces the size of held items and blocks to make you able to see more of your screen. This includes every block and item. This is similar to item size mod in the badlion client as well as other mods which make items smaller.

Thanks Zoovadude for the amazing icon!

If you have any issues or feature requests please join the Discord

# Showcase
You can check the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items/gallery) for more examples

![Blocks are smaller when held](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb61f78641b0eb0bf7904579e49566a3d809bf2d.png)

![All items are smaller when held (including weapons)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52d4bc1659799503eadd431eabaff7e94fff68eb.png)

![Shields are smaller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zJqtIRfZ/images/9f6df10c7c27bf9927fdf54c219cf0ed5f71b952.png)

This pack also edits some models in order to fix a few of the issues described in [MC-114274](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-114274). The blocks that are fixed are glazed terracotta and chiseled bookshelf.

![Some rotatable blocks are changed to face you like how you would place them in front of you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zJqtIRfZ/images/61ac70dfef4e1aa4b09ce0c6944ed905cf26d620.png)

There are also changes to head / skulls so they face towards you when held (like in versions before 1.9)

![Skulls and heads face towards you when held](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zJqtIRfZ/images/bc92fcdfa9d0794beb401cb751d0bb5bc2d0c040.png)

# Extra Versions
### Minecraft 1.8.9 & 1.12.2
There is a version for Minecraft 1.8.9 which is nice because I haven't seen any other packs like this. There are mods that do this but this is for people who don't want to download those mods.  
[1.8.9 Version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items/versions?g=1.8.9)  
[1.12.2 Version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-held-items/versions?g=1.12.2)
